digest.component_or_area: test suite conftest identity enforcement guard
propositions: A stray global env REBAR_IDENTITY_REQUIRE_AUTHENTICATED=1 breaks the suite broadly by failing create/mutate of non-exempt types with a 'cannot be signed' CommandError.
Flipping require_authenticated in rebar.toml does not break the suite because test stores use isolated tmp REBAR_ROOT and config discovery never reaches the real rebar.toml.
An autouse fixture in tests/conftest.py should force REBAR_IDENTITY_REQUIRE_AUTHENTICATED=0 to guard against a stray global default.
The guard must not disturb dedicated identity enforcement tests, which set the flag ON via isolated subprocess env dicts.
The full suite should pass both with and without a stray global REBAR_IDENTITY_REQUIRE_AUTHENTICATED=1 in the environment.
